title: poa angustifolia f. collina
intro: Poa angustifolia f. collina, also known as blue grama grass, is a perennial grass species native to the Great Plains of North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, reducing fever, and relieving pain. The health benefits of Poa angustifolia f. collina include its ability to promote digestion, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in herbal remedies such as salves and poultices.
